KStat
blocks.content:
struct KStat {
        st_dev: u64,
        st_ino: u64,
        st_mode: u32,
        st_nlink: u32,
        st_uid: u32,
        st_gid: u32,
        st_rdev: u64,
        __pad: u64,
        st_size: i64,
        st_blksize: u32,
        __pad2: i32,
        st_blocks: u64,
        st_atime_sec: i64,
        st_atime_nsec: i64,
        st_mtime_sec: i64,
        st_mtime_nsec: i64,
        st_ctime_sec: i64,
        st_ctime_nsec: i64,
        __unused: [u32; 2],
    }
    let ks = KStat {
        st_dev: meta.fs_id as _,
        st_ino: meta.vnode_id,
        st_mode: meta.permissions.bits() as _,
        st_nlink: meta.nlinks as u32,
        st_uid: meta.uid,
        st_gid: meta.gid,
        st_rdev: meta.rdev.unwrap_or(0),
        __pad: 0,
        st_size: meta.size as _,
        st_blksize: 4096,
        __pad2: 0,
        st_blocks: ((meta.size + 511) / 512) as _,
        st_atime_sec: meta.timestamps.accessed.as_u64() as _,
        st_atime_nsec: 0,
        st_mtime_sec: meta.timestamps.modified.as_u64() as _,
        st_mtime_nsec: 0,
        st_ctime_sec: meta.timestamps.changed.as_u64() as _,
        st_ctime_nsec: 0,
        __unused: [0; 2],
    };
    // ostd::prelude::println!("ks: {:?}", ks);
    // 写回用户态
    state
        .process_vm
        .write_bytes(kstat_ptr, &mut VmReader::from(ks.as_bytes()))?;
    Ok(ControlFlow::Continue(Some(0)))
}

    state
        .process_vm
        .write_bytes(stat_ptr, &mut VmReader::from(ks.as_bytes()))?;

blocks.name: Statx
blocks.content:
pub struct Statx {
    stx_mask: u32,              // 已填充字段的掩码
    stx_blksize: u32,           // 文件系统 I/O 块大小
    stx_attributes: u64,        // 额外文件属性指示器
    stx_nlink: u32,             // 硬链接数
    stx_uid: u32,               // 所有者用户 ID
    stx_gid: u32,               // 所有者组 ID
    stx_mode: u16,              // 文件类型和模式
    __pad0: u16,
    stx_ino: u64,               // Inode 号
    stx_size: u64,              // 总大小（字节）
    stx_blocks: u64,            // 分配的 512B 块数
    stx_attributes_mask: u64,   // stx_attributes 中支持的掩码
    stx_atime: StatxTimestamp,  // 最后访问时间
    stx_btime: StatxTimestamp,  // 创建时间
    stx_ctime: StatxTimestamp,  // 最后状态改变时间
    stx_mtime: StatxTimestamp,  // 最后修改时间
    stx_rdev_major: u32,        // 设备主号（如果是设备文件）
    stx_rdev_minor: u32,        // 设备次号（如果是设备文件）
    stx_dev_major: u32,         // 包含文件系统的设备主号
    stx_dev_minor: u32,         // 包含文件系统的设备次号
    stx_mnt_id: u64,            // 挂载点 ID
    stx_dio_mem_align: u32,     // 直接 I/O 内存对齐
    stx_dio_offset_align: u32,  // 直接 I/O 偏移对齐
    __spare: [u64; 12],         // 预留字段
}

blocks.content:
pub fn translate_attr(attr: Ext4FileAttr) -> FileAttr {
    FileAttr {
        ino: attr.ino as u64,
        size: attr.size,
        blocks: attr.blocks,
        atime: second2sys_time(attr.atime),
        mtime: second2sys_time(attr.mtime),
        ctime: second2sys_time(attr.ctime),
        crtime: second2sys_time(attr.crtime),
        kind: translate_ftype(attr.ftype),
        perm: attr.perm.bits(),
        nlink: attr.links as u32,
        uid: attr.uid,
        gid: attr.gid,
        rdev: 0,
        blksize: INODE_BLOCK_SIZE as u32,
        flags: 0,
    }
}

syscall
blocks.content:
pub async fn syscall(state: &mut ThreadState, context: &mut UserContext) -> Result<ControlFlow<i32, Option<isize>>> {
    match context.syscall_number() as c_long {
        SYS_clone => do_clone(state, context).await,
        SYS_wait4 => do_wait4(state, context).await,
        SYS_exit => do_exit(state, context, false).await,
        SYS_exit_group => do_exit(state, context, true).await,
        SYS_execve => do_execve(state, context).await,
        SYS_getpid => do_getpid(state, context).await,
        SYS_getppid => do_getppid(state, context).await,
        SYS_openat => do_openat(state, context).await,
        SYS_close => do_close(state, context).await,
        SYS_read => do_read(state, context).await,
        SYS_write => do_write(state, context).await,
        SYS_lseek => do_lseek(state, context).await,
        SYS_getdents64 => do_getdents64(state, context).await,
        SYS_linkat => do_linkat(state, context).await,
        SYS_unlinkat => do_unlinkat(state, context).await,
        SYS_mkdirat => do_mkdirat(state, context).await,
        SYS_mount => do_mount(state, context).await,
        SYS_umount2 => do_umount2(state, context).await,
        SYS_fstat => do_fstat(state, context).await,
        SYS_newfstatat => do_newfstatat(state, context).await,
        SYS_ftruncate => do_ftruncate(state, context).await,
        SYS_pread64 => do_pread64(state, context).await,
        SYS_pwrite64 => do_pwrite64(state, context).await,
        SYS_statx => do_statx(state, context).await,
        SYS_sched_yield => do_sched_yield(state, context).await,
        SYS_getcwd => do_getcwd(state, context).await,
        SYS_pipe2 => do_pipe2(state, context).await,
        SYS_splice => do_splice(state, context).await,
        SYS_dup => do_dup(state, context).await,
        SYS_dup3 => do_dup3(state, context).await,
        SYS_copy_file_range => do_copy_file_range(state, context).await,
        SYS_chdir => do_chdir(state, context).await,
        SYS_brk => do_brk(state, context).await,
        SYS_mmap => do_mmap(state, context).await,
        SYS_munmap => do_munmap(state, context).await,
        SYS_mprotect => do_mprotect(state, context).await,
        SYS_uname => do_uname(state, context).await,
        SYS_times => do_times(state, context).await,
        SYS_gettimeofday => do_gettimeofday(state, context).await,
        SYS_clock_gettime => do_clock_gettime(state, context).await,
        SYS_clock_nanosleep => do_clock_nanosleep(state, context).await,
        SYS_nanosleep => do_nanosleep(state, context).await,
        // 线程相关（glibc/musl初始化常用）
        SYS_set_tid_address => users::do_set_tid_address(state, context).await,
        SYS_gettid => users::do_gettid(state, context).await,
        // 简单的凭据查询：返回0，满足glibc初始化对UID/GID的依赖
        SYS_getuid => users::do_getuid().await,
        SYS_geteuid => users::do_geteuid().await,
        SYS_getgid => users::do_getgid().await,
        SYS_getegid => users::do_getegid().await,
        // 线程健壮互斥列表
        SYS_set_robust_list => robust::do_set_robust_list(state, context).await,
        SYS_get_robust_list => robust::do_get_robust_list(state, context).await,
        // 信号桩
        SYS_rt_sigprocmask => signal::do_rt_sigprocmask(state, context).await,
        SYS_rt_sigaction => signal::do_rt_sigaction(state, context).await,
        SYS_tgkill => signal::do_tgkill(state, context).await,
        // 最小 I/O 向量与设备控制桩
        SYS_readv => fs::do_readv(state, context).await,
        SYS_writev => fs::do_writev(state, context).await,
        SYS_preadv => fs::do_preadv(state, context).await,
        SYS_pwritev => fs::do_pwritev(state, context).await,
        SYS_preadv2 => fs::do_preadv(state, context).await,
        SYS_pwritev2 => fs::do_pwritev(state, context).await,
        SYS_readlinkat => fs::do_readlinkat(state, context).await,
        SYS_renameat2 => fs::do_renameat2(state, context).await,
        SYS_ioctl => fs::do_ioctl(state, context).await,
        // 资源与随机
        SYS_prlimit64 => limits::do_prlimit64(state, context).await,
        SYS_getrandom => random::do_getrandom(state, context).await,
        num => {
            warn!("syscall not implemented: number={}, name={}, args={:?}", num, sys_call_name(num).unwrap_or("unknown"), context.syscall_arguments());
            Err(errno_with_message(nexus_error::Errno::ENOSYS, "syscall not implemented")).attach_printable_lazy(|| {
                alloc::format!("number={}, name={}, args={:?}", num, sys_call_name(num).unwrap_or("unknown"), context.syscall_arguments())
            })
        }
    }
}

make_fake_header
blocks.content:
pub fn make_fake_header(
        version: u32,
        device_id: u32,
        vendor_id: u32,
        device_features: u32,
        queue_num_max: u32,
    ) -> Self {
        Self {
            magic: ReadPure(MAGIC_VALUE),
            version: ReadPure(version),
            device_id: ReadPure(device_id),
            vendor_id: ReadPure(vendor_id),
            device_features: ReadPure(device_features),
            device_features_sel: WriteOnly::default(),
            __r1: Default::default(),
            driver_features: Default::default(),
            driver_features_sel: Default::default(),
            legacy_guest_page_size: Default::default(),
            __r2: Default::default(),
            queue_sel: Default::default(),
            queue_num_max: ReadPure(queue_num_max),
            queue_num: Default::default(),
            legacy_queue_align: Default::default(),
            legacy_queue_pfn: Default::default(),
            queue_ready: Default::default(),
            __r3: Default::default(),
            queue_notify: Default::default(),
            __r4: Default::default(),
            interrupt_status: Default::default(),
            interrupt_ack: Default::default(),
            __r5: Default::default(),
            status: ReadPureWrite(DeviceStatus::empty()),
            __r6: Default::default(),
            queue_desc_low: Default::default(),
            queue_desc_high: Default::default(),
            __r7: Default::default(),
            queue_driver_low: Default::default(),
            queue_driver_high: Default::default(),
            __r8: Default::default(),
            queue_device_low: Default::default(),
            queue_device_high: Default::default(),
            __r9: Default::default(),
            config_generation: Default::default(),
        }
    }
}

blocks.name: impl Icr {
blocks.content:
impl Icr {
    #[expect(clippy::too_many_arguments)]

blocks.name: new
blocks.content:
pub fn new(
        destination: ApicId,
        destination_shorthand: DestinationShorthand,
        trigger_mode: TriggerMode,
        level: Level,
        delivery_status: DeliveryStatus,
        destination_mode: DestinationMode,
        delivery_mode: DeliveryMode,
        vector: u8,
    ) -> Self {
        let dest = match destination {
            ApicId::XApic(d) => (d as u64) << 56,
            ApicId::X2Apic(d) => (d as u64) << 32,
        };
        Icr(dest
            | ((destination_shorthand as u64) << 18)
            | ((trigger_mode as u64) << 15)
            | ((level as u64) << 14)
            | ((delivery_status as u64) << 12)
            | ((destination_mode as u64) << 11)
            | ((delivery_mode as u64) << 8)
            | (vector as u64))
    }

    /// Returns the lower 32 bits of the ICR.
